description: A media file — image, video, PDF, etc. A queryable record of one blob's metadata; the bytes live in R2 (the blobs service). The record's rkey is the blob CID. Bodies reference media as ![](blob://<cid>). The image-only fields (width, height, blurhash, dominantColor) are absent on other media types.

cid.description: The blob's content identifier — also this record's rkey.

mime.description: MIME type, e.g. image/jpeg, video/mp4, application/pdf.

dominantColor.description: Dominant color as a hex string, e.g. #3a2f1c. Images only.
